description: A photograph depicting an agro-forestry landscape, likely a *dehesa* or *montado* typical of the Mediterranean area. The foreground and midground are dominated by dense, low-lying green and yellowish shrubs or scrub vegetation. Scattered evergreen trees, appearing to be oaks, are visible in the midground and background, forming a sparse woodland pattern. The ground cover consists of dry earth and sparse grasses. The sky is clear blue. The scene illustrates a land use management system combining agricultural and forestry techniques, with a visible understory that is characteristic of areas where it is regularly cleared.
